nasb.text: Now a man of Benjamin ran from the battle line and came to Shiloh the same day with his clothes torn and dust on his head.

esv.text: A man of Benjamin ran from the battle line and came to Shiloh the same day, with his clothes torn and with dirt on his head.

cnv.text: 有一個便雅憫人跑離戰場，衣服撕裂，頭蒙塵土，當天來到示羅。

ccb.text: 当天有一个便雅悯人逃出了战场，他撕烂衣服，头蒙灰尘，来到示罗。
